PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Continued To Oct-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Miller for and with Paul Kass.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to October 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The temporary letters expire on that date (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)
